messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0040",
  "title": "26媒体声音",
  "page_index": 27,
  "page_range": "27"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0041",
    "title": "游戏葡萄 & GameLook",
    "page_range": "27-28",
    "summary": "This section contains only the names of two Chinese gaming industry media outlets, \"游戏葡萄\" (GameGrape) and \"GameLook,\" alongside a page reference. It provides no substantive content, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, tables, figures, or evidence. It can only answer basic identification questions, such as which media entities are listed or referenced in this portion of the document. No dates, analytical claims, procedural steps, or supporting evidence are present."
  }
]

message.content: This section, titled "26媒体声音" (Media Voices), serves as a brief reference listing two Chinese gaming industry media entities: "游戏葡萄" (GameGrape) and "GameLook." It contains no dates, definitions, procedures, analytical claims, metrics, tables, figures, or supporting evidence. The content is strictly limited to entity identification, making it retrievable only for queries regarding which specific media outlets are referenced on page 27.
